hooks.description: Activates dev-designer-utility engine when the task involves design tokens, colors, fonts, typography, UX strategy, visual design systems, or design artifacts.

actions.message: dev-designer-utility engine active. Aria standing by for design system decisions.

hooks.description: Verifies design consistency, token integrity, accessibility compliance, and mathematical precision before finalizing design output.

checks.rule: All color, spacing, and typography values reference named design tokens. No raw hex codes, arbitrary pixel values, or unnamed magic numbers in output.
Text-background color pairs meet WCAG 2.2 AA minimums: 4.5:1 for body text, 3:1 for large text (18px+) and UI components. Verified with OKLab perceptual model.
Font sizes derive from a mathematical scale (modular, perfect fourth, major third, or custom ratio). No arbitrary font-size values.
Spacing values follow the 4pt base grid. Permitted values: 4, 8, 12, 16, 20, 24, 32, 40, 48, 64, 80, 96, 128. Deviations require explicit justification.
Generated color palettes maintain perceptual uniformity across lightness steps. Adjacent palette steps have consistent delta-L in OKLab space.
Font engineering output is validated against OpenType spec. Glyph coordinates use integer values. Tables are correctly ordered. Subsetting preserves required glyphs.
